skills.name: project_summary
skills.description: Read README.md and summarize the project status, architecture, and next steps.
skills.suggested_prompt: 请读取 README.md，并用三点总结这个项目。

skills.name: build_diagnosis
skills.description: Inspect CMake/vcpkg configuration and suggest fixes for build failures.
skills.suggested_prompt: 请读取 CMakePresets.json、vcpkg.json 和 CMakeLists.txt，帮我排查构建问题。
